chapter_title.ar: باب مَا جَاءَ فِي الِاثْنَيْ عَشَرَ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَيْهِمْ ( عليهم السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 126 – What has come regarding the twelve and the text upon them<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/222)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/222)
text: سَمِعْتُ عَلِيَّ بْنَ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ إِنَّ اللَّهَ خَلَقَ مُحَمَّداً وَ عَلِيّاً وَ أَحَدَ عَشَرَ مِنْ وُلْدِهِ مِنْ نُورِ عَظَمَتِهِ فَأَقَامَهُمْ أَشْبَاحاً فِي ضِيَاءِ نُورِهِ يَعْبُدُونَهُ قَبْلَ خَلْقِ الْخَلْقِ يُسَبِّحُونَ اللَّهَ وَ يُقَدِّسُونَهُ وَ هُمُ الْأَئِمَّةُ مِنْ وُلْدِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Ahmad, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Abu Saeed Al Usfoury, from Amro Bin Sabit, from Abu Hamza who said,

‘I heard Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Created Muhammad<sup>saww</sup> and Ali<sup>asws</sup> and eleven from his<sup>asws</sup> sons<sup>asws</sup> from the Light of His<sup>azwj</sup> Magnificence. Then He<sup>azwj</sup> Stood them<sup>asws</sup> as being resemblances in the illumination of His<sup>azwj</sup> Light, worshipping Him<sup>azwj</sup> before the creation of the creatures. They<sup>asws</sup> were Glorifying Allah<sup>azwj</sup> and they<sup>asws</sup> were Extolling His<sup>azwj</sup> Holiness, and they<sup>asws</sup> are the Imams<sup>asws</sup> from the children of Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 6. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn Ahmad from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn from abu Sa‘id al-‘Usfuriy from ‘Amr aaand ibn Thabit from abu Hamza who has said the following. “I heard Ali ibn al-Husayn say, ‘Allah created Muhammad , Ali and the eleven Imams from his descendants out of the light of His greatness. He then placed them as figures in the brightness of His light where they worshipped Him before the creation of the creatures. They would speak of the Glory of Allah and of His Holiness. They are the Imams from descendants of the Messenger of Allah.”
